rationale: A maxterm is a full elementary disjunction (def:elementary-disjunction) containing exactly one literal P_i or not-P_i for each variable (def:literal). Both were missing from the empty set.
notes: The statement has a rendering gap where the genus term ('elementary disjunction') dropped out, so the genus is inferred from context (maxterm in CNF = complete elementary disjunction, dual to the existing def:minterm). Lower confidence reflects that gap -> routes to focused re-run. The variable list P_1..P_n also points at a variable/variable-set notion (ambient typing here).
